updates.title: Duet TMC Tuner update
updates.notifyPlugin: Duet TMC Tuner v{version} is available. Open Plugins → TMC Tuner to update.
updates.notifyDwc: Duet TMC Tuner v{version} needs DuetWebControl {dwc} — update DWC first.
updates.applyFailed: No downloadable asset found for this release.
updates.corsBlocked: Couldn't fetch the update automatically — opening the download instead.
updates.installedReload: v{version} installed. Reload DWC to finish.

diagnostics.copyFailed: Couldn't copy — try the download instead.
